'''âm-k-b-y''' ('''kamakbeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vampire|vampire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vampire|vampire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-k-b-y
|-
! Lemma
| kamakbeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
